chunks.title: Jehoshaphat and Ahab Alliance
chunks.reason: Establishes the political alliance and the invitation to battle.

chunks.title: The Four Hundred Prophets and Micaiah's First Vision
chunks.reason: Contrasts the false prophets with Micaiah's initial vision of Israel scattered.

chunks.title: The Heavenly Council and Micaiah's Arrest
chunks.reason: Details the divine council scene where a lying spirit is sent, followed by Micaiah's confrontation and imprisonment.

chunks.title: The Battle at Ramoth-gilead
chunks.reason: Describes the battle strategy, the accidental death of Ahab, and his eventual demise.
